title: BC-CGL Navier-Stokes Regularity Programme: Source code and DNS results
description: Source code and direct numerical simulation (DNS) results for the paper 'Toward Global Regularity of 3D Navier-Stokes Equations via Bicomplex Calderon-Zygmund-Ginzburg-Landau Theory'. Includes: (1) JAX-based pseudo-spectral NS solver with helical decomposition diagnostics, (2) Taylor-Green vortex DNS at Re=2000-10000, N=128-256, (3) enstrophy budget closure verification (0.2% median residual), (4) evidence for CZ cancellation phenomenon (epsilon ~ Re^{-0.6}).
